trigger.Name: First_cin
trigger.script:
CompleteQuest("sever_quest")
SetWeather(1)
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
Fly("Start_cam01", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 7, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic() UpdateCinematic(1)
AddCinematicMessage( 0, 1 ) AddCinematicMessage( 1, 0.5 )
TActivate("First_cin_vehicle") TActivate("First_cin_end")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: First_cin_vehicle
trigger.script: local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetPosition( CVector(3216.784, 327.161, 308.453)) vehPlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.002, 0.243, 0.022, -0.970)) end trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: First_cin1
trigger.script:
CompleteQuest("FindPath_quest1")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
Fly("Start_cam02", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 5, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic()
AddCinematicMessage( 2, 1 )
TActivate("First_cin1_vehicle") TActivate("First_cin1_end")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: First_cin1_vehicle
trigger.script: local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) end trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Vstrecha_cin
trigger.script:
CompleteQuest("FindPath_quest2")
PlayCustomMusic("IntenseDialogue02")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
Fly("Vstrecha_cam01", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 22, 1, 0 ) Fly("Vstrecha_cam02", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 8, 0, 1 ) StartCinematic()
if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then AddCinematicMessage( 10003, 1 ) else AddCinematicMessage( 3, 1 ) end AddCinematicMessage( 4, 1 ) if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then AddCinematicMessage( 10005, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 10006, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 10007, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 10008, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 10009, 0.5 ) else AddCinematicMessage( 5, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 6, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 7, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 8, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 9, 0.5 ) end
TActivate("Vstrecha_cin_vehicle") TActivate("Vstrecha_cin_dop_1") TActivate("Vstrecha_cin_end")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Vstrecha_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
TeamCreate("Boec01",1029,CVector(1604.118, 264.520, 1671.272),{"CoolBelaz_3"}, nil, 1) TeamCreate("Boec02",1029,CVector(1604.118, 264.520, 1671.272),{"Cruiser01"}, nil, 1) TeamCreate("Boec03",1029,CVector(1604.118, 264.520, 1671.272),{"Cruiser02"}, nil, 1)
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetPosition( CVector(2709.977, 294.077, 868.997)) vehPlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.076, -0.689, 0.054, 0.719)) end
if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then
local VehCarFur1 = GetEntityByName("FuryCar3_vehicle_0") if VehCarFur1 then VehCarFur1:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) VehCarFur1:SetThrottle(0) VehCarFur1:SetPosition( CVector(2727.640, 298.746, 848.023)) VehCarFur1:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.097, -0.572, 0.048, 0.813)) VehCarFur1:setImmortalMode(1) end
end
local vehBoy1 = GetEntityByName("Boec01_vehicle_0") if vehBoy1 then vehBoy1:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehBoy1:SetThrottle(0) vehBoy1:SetPosition( CVector(2587.257, 281.744, 844.434)) vehBoy1:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.042, -0.615, 0.020, -0.787)) end
local vehBoy2 = GetEntityByName("Boec02_vehicle_0") if vehBoy2 then vehBoy2:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehBoy2:SetThrottle(0) vehBoy2:SetPosition( CVector(2588.392, 281.459, 830.003)) vehBoy2:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.056, -0.611, 0.023, -0.789)) end
local vehBoy3 = GetEntityByName("Boec03_vehicle_0") if vehBoy3 then vehBoy3:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehBoy3:SetThrottle(0) vehBoy3:SetPosition( CVector(2576.404, 282.623, 856.774)) vehBoy3:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.017, -0.743, 0.019, -0.668)) end
local vehBoy11 = GetEntityByName("Boec01") if vehBoy11 then vehBoy11:SetDestination(CVector(2665.543, 284.000, 865.926)) end
local vehBoy22 = GetEntityByName("Boec02") if vehBoy22 then vehBoy22:SetDestination(CVector(2653.543, 281.000, 851.926)) end
local vehBoy33 = GetEntityByName("Boec03") if vehBoy33 then vehBoy33:SetDestination(CVector(2653.543, 286.000, 885.926)) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Vstrecha_cin_dop_1
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("Passage03")
AddCinematicMessage( 10, 0.5 ) if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then AddCinematicMessage( 10011, 0.5 ) else AddCinematicMessage( 11, 0.5 ) end
TeamCreate("Valky011",1013,CVector(2685.533, 319.678, 1006.267),{"Ural03","Cruiser02","MirotvorecShot_2","Cruiser01","Ural00"}, CVector(2665.543, 284.000, 865.926), 1)
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Vstrecha_cin_end
trigger.script:
local ValkyTm1 = GetEntityByName("Valky011") if ValkyTm1 then ValkyTm1:Remove() end
TeamCreate("Valky01",1013,CVector(2685.533, 319.678, 1006.267),{"Ural03","Cruiser02","MirotvorecShot_2","Cruiser01","Ural00"}, CVector(2665.543, 284.000, 865.926), 1)
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
SetTolerance( 1100, 1013, RS_ENEMY ) SetTolerance( 1100, 1029, RS_ALLY )
TActivate("Vstrecha_cin2")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Vstrecha_cin2
trigger.script:
CompleteQuest("FindPath_quest3")
PlayCustomMusic("IntenseDialogue04")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
Fly("Vstrecha_cam02", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 17, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic()
AddCinematicMessage( 12, 1 ) if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then AddCinematicMessage( 10013, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 10014, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 10015, 0.5 ) else AddCinematicMessage( 13, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 14, 0.5 ) AddCinematicMessage( 15, 0.5 ) end
TActivate("Vstrecha_cin2_vehicle") TActivate("Vstrecha_cin2_end")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Vstrecha_cin2_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) end
if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then
local VehCarFur1 = GetEntityByName("FuryCar3_vehicle_0") if VehCarFur1 then VehCarFur1:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) VehCarFur1:SetThrottle(0) VehCarFur1:setImmortalMode(1) end
end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Vstrecha_cin2_end
trigger.script:
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
local vehBoy111 = GetEntityByName("Boec01") if vehBoy111 then vehBoy111:Remove() end
local vehBoy222 = GetEntityByName("Boec02") if vehBoy222 then vehBoy222:Remove() end
local vehBoy333 = GetEntityByName("Boec03") if vehBoy333 then vehBoy333:Remove() end
TeamCreate("Boec001",1029,CVector(2678.118, 305.520, 958.272),{"CoolBelaz_3"}, CVector(2262.543, 285.000, 2013.926), 1) TeamCreate("Boec002",1029,CVector(2655.118, 303.520, 955.272),{"Cruiser01"}, CVector(2262.543, 285.000, 2013.926), 1) TeamCreate("Boec003",1029,CVector(2708.118, 305.520, 945.272),{"Cruiser02"}, CVector(2262.543, 285.000, 2013.926), 1)
TActivate("Vorota_cin")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Vorota_cin
trigger.script:
CompleteQuest("FindPath_quest4")
PlayCustomMusic("IntenseDialogue01")
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
Fly("Vorota_cam01", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 10, 1, 0 ) Fly("Vorota_cam02", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 6, 0, 1 ) StartCinematic()
AddCinematicMessage( 16, 1 ) if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then AddCinematicMessage( 10017, 0.5 ) else AddCinematicMessage( 17, 0.5 ) end AddCinematicMessage( 18, 1 )
TActivate("Vorota_cin_vehicle") TActivate("Vorota_cin_dop_1") TActivate("Vorota_cin_end")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Vorota_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehBoy111 = GetEntityByName("Boec001") if vehBoy111 then vehBoy111:Remove() end
local vehBoy222 = GetEntityByName("Boec002") if vehBoy222 then vehBoy222:Remove() end
TeamCreate("Boec011",1029,CVector(1604.118, 264.520, 1671.272),{"CoolBelaz_3"}, nil, 1) TeamCreate("Boec022",1029,CVector(1604.118, 264.520, 1671.272),{"Cruiser01"}, nil, 1)
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetPosition( CVector(2318.745, 298.917, 2066.624)) vehPlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.058, 0.118, 0.029, 0.991)) end
if IsQuestComplete("Fury_quest5") then
local VehCarFur1 = GetEntityByName("FuryCar3_vehicle_0") if VehCarFur1 then VehCarFur1:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) VehCarFur1:SetThrottle(0) VehCarFur1:SetPosition( CVector(2308.503, 297.594, 2061.453)) VehCarFur1:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.067, 0.072, 0.029, 0.995)) VehCarFur1:setImmortalMode(1) end
end
local vehBoy1 = GetEntityByName("Boec011_vehicle_0") if vehBoy1 then vehBoy1:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehBoy1:SetThrottle(0) vehBoy1:SetPosition( CVector(2315.342, 301.117, 2089.247)) vehBoy1:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.046, 0.036, 0.000, 0.998)) end
local vehBoy2 = GetEntityByName("Boec022_vehicle_0") if vehBoy2 then vehBoy2:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehBoy2:SetThrottle(0) vehBoy2:SetPosition( CVector(2292.807, 298.607, 2073.543)) vehBoy2:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.066, 0.228, 0.010, 0.971)) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Vorota_cin_dop_1
trigger.script:
PlayCustomMusic("QuietDialogue03")
local moverId = CreateNewObject { prototypeName = "cinematicMover", objName = "" } local mover = GetEntityByID( moverId ) local controlledObj = GetEntityByName("VOROTA1") if controlledObj then mover:SetObjAndPath( controlledObj:GetId(), "Vorota_Open_1", 8 ) end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Vorota_cin_end
trigger.script:
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
local vehBoy111 = GetEntityByName("Boec011") if vehBoy111 then vehBoy111:Remove() end
local vehBoy222 = GetEntityByName("Boec022") if vehBoy222 then vehBoy222:Remove() end
local vehBoy333 = GetEntityByName("Boec003") if vehBoy333 then vehBoy333:Remove() end
TeamCreate("Boec101",1029,CVector(2315.342, 301.117, 2089.247),{"CoolBelaz_3"}, CVector(2348.543, 300.195, 2256.926), 1) TeamCreate("Boec102",1029,CVector(2292.807, 298.607, 2073.543),{"Cruiser01"}, CVector(2346.543, 300.195, 2231.926), 1) TeamCreate("Boec103",1029,CVector(2262.543, 285.000, 2013.926),{"Cruiser02"}, CVector(2344.543, 300.195, 2205.823), 1)
local moverId = CreateNewObject { prototypeName = "cinematicMover", objName = "" } local mover = GetEntityByID( moverId ) local controlledObj = GetEntityByName("VOROTA1") if controlledObj then mover:SetObjAndPath( controlledObj:GetId(), "Vorota_Open_1", 5 ) end
TActivate("CLOSE_VOR1") TActivate("OPEN_VOR1")
trigger:Deactivate()
